channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AWS tries to lure users to its cloud via storage ease of use
item.description: At its re:Invent 2024 conference this week, AWS rolled out five new storage tools and services with the goal of making its offerings easier to work with, if not cheaper or better. With the incremental differences in the major enterprise cloud environments today, that may be enough.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Ocasio-Cortez first person to hit a million followers on Bluesky
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.) is the first person to hit a million followers on the social platform Bluesky, according to the platform. Other than Bluesky’s own account, Ocasio-Cortez’s follower landmark is a first for a user, the platform told The Hill on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Cyber Monday Delivers Record-Breaking Sales and Chaos for Bay Area Shoppers
item.description: Record-breaking Cyber Monday sales bring chaos to Bay Area residents, with shoppers snatching deals on electronics, skin care products, and more.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Lam, The Mercury News

item.title: Cyber Monday shoppers expected to set a record on the year's biggest day for online shopping
item.description: Consumers in the United States are scouring the internet for online deals as they look to take advantage of the post-Thanksgiving shopping marathon with Cyber Monday.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: FTC opens Microsoft antitrust investigation that Trump administration must carry on or drop
item.description: Antitrust enforcers with the Federal Trade Commission have opened a wide-ranging investigation into Microsoft's business practices, starting a big legal project that an incoming Trump administration must take up or abandon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Linux fundamentals: Viewing files, commands, processes and systems
item.description: Linux provides a useful array of commands for managing file permissions, getting information on commands, displaying running processes and displaying details on the system itself.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Rise of Old-School Check Fraud: A Growing Threat to Americans
item.description: Check fraud has seen a staggering 400% increase last year, with scammers stealing $26.2 billion from Americans through simple yet effective tactics.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Sasha Luccioni wants to create Energy Star ratings for AI
item.description: Sasha Luccioni was experiencing something of a quarter-life crisis. It was early 2018, and Luccioni was working as an AI researcher at Morgan Stanley, where she spent her days thinking about how to use the rapidly advancing technology to head off financial risks.
item.dc:creator: Issie Lapowsky, Fast Company

item.title: Red Hat Ansible service comes to AWS Marketplace
item.description: Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform Service, for automating the management of hybrid cloud infrastructure, now is available as a managed offering on Amazon Web Services through the AWS Marketplace. General availability of Red Hat’s automation service was announced December 2.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia's closest rival once again obliterates cloud giants in AI performance; Cerebras Inference is 75x faster than AWS, 32x faster than Google on Llama 3.1 405B
item.description: Cerebras Inference leads in AI performance; 75x faster than AWS, 32x faster than Google on Llama 3.1 405B.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Bipartisan bill would study AI's impact on banking, housing
item.description: A new bill with bipartisan support would commission studies on the use of artificial intelligence (AI) in the banking and housing sectors, where lawmakers have been sounding an alarm about algorithmic price fixing and commercial misconduct enabled by new technologies.
item.dc:creator: Tobias Burns, The Hill

item.title: How to apply AI in complex domains
item.description: Skepticism in artificial intelligence (AI) applications has proliferated exponentially over the past year, especially in industries with complex regulatory frameworks and rigid operational boundaries.
item.dc:creator: Ben Borodach, Fast Company

item.title: AWS PartyRock updated with free daily usage for developers
item.description: Amazon Web Services has updated AWS PartyRock, its mostly free low code tool for building generative AI applications with a new app search function and the ability to build document processing into applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Data broker blunder: More than 600,000 sensitive files exposed in data services leak
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses how 600,000-plus records, including checks and property data, were left exposed online by an information service provider.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Las 15 tecnologías más infravaloradas en el ecosistema de TI
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) continúa dominando los debates sobre tecnología, a medida que los ejecutivos (y los trabajadores de todos los niveles) buscan formas de usarla para hacer que el trabajo sea más fácil, más rápido y, en última instancia, más rentable.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger retires
item.description: Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger retired Sunday, after more than 40 years in the industry. The company quickly named two interim co-CEOs to hold the fort while it searches for a long-term replacement.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 7 surprisingly practical ways to use ChatGPT’s free voice wizard
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here. ChatGPT’s Advanced Voice Mode—free as of Oct 21—is like having a 24/7 wizard in your pocket.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: AWS brings RAG evaluation and LLM-as-a-judge feature to Amazon Bedrock
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has updated Amazon Bedrock with features designed to help enterprises streamline the testing of applications before deployment.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Makro transforma su gestión de recursos humanos gracias a la RPA
item.description: Makro, conocido distribuidor mayorista del mercado español, se suma a la transformación digital de sus procesos internos tecnología mediante. En esta ocasión, la organización ha apostado por optimizar y eficientar sus operaciones en la división de Recursos Humanos (RR.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AWS’ Amazon Connect service gets new-gen AI updates
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has updated its Amazon Connect contact center service to help enterprises offer a better end-to-end customer experience, the company announced at its ongoing annual re:Invent conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 15 most underhyped technologies in IT
item.description: Artificial intelligence continues to dominate technology discussions, as executives — and workers at all levels — seek ways to use AI to make work easier, faster, and ultimately more profitable. Such hype is mostly justified, as AI is already delivering value in multiple ways.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Refactoring AI code: The good, the bad, and the weird
item.description: Generative AI is no longer a novelty in the software development world: it’s being increasingly used as an assistant (and sometimes a free agent) to write code running in real-world production. But every developer knows that writing new code from scratch is only a small part of their daily work.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Certificación SAFe: inicie su carrera en Scaled Agile Framework
item.description: ¿Qué es la certificación SAFe? Las certificaciones de Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) se están volviendo valiosas para las organizaciones más grandes que buscan una ejecución eficiente de proyectos, una reducción del tiempo de comercialización y formas de brindar un mayor valor a las partes interesad
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: As temperatures turn frigid, Minnesotans turn to saunas for warmth and community
item.description: As temperatures drop into the teens, Minnesotans have embraced sauna culture for warmth and community.
item.dc:creator: Michael Goldberg And Mark Vancleave, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Federal prosecutors seek records from company that deployed AI weapons scanner on NYC subway
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal investigators in New York are seeking records from the manufacturer of an AI-powered weapons scanner that was briefly deployed this summer in New York City’s subway system.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4
